시편 32:1.content: Blessed is he whose disobedience is forgiven, whose sin is covered.

시편 32:2.content: Blessed is the man to whom Yahweh doesn’t impute iniquity, in whose spirit there is no deceit.

시편 32:3.content: When I kept silence, my bones wasted away through my groaning all day long.

시편 32:4.content: For day and night your hand was heavy on me. My strength was sapped in the heat of summer.

시편 32:5.content: I acknowledged my sin to you. I didn’t hide my iniquity. I said, I will confess my transgressions to Yahweh, and you forgave the iniquity of my sin.

시편 32:6.content: For this, let everyone who is godly pray to you in a time when you may be found. Surely when the great waters overflow, they shall not reach to him.

시편 32:7.content: You are my hiding place. You will preserve me from trouble. You will surround me with songs of deliverance.

시편 32:8.content: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you shall go. I will counsel you with my eye on you.

시편 32:9.content: Don’t be like the horse, or like the mule, which have no understanding, who are controlled by bit and bridle, or else they will not come near to you.

시편 32:10.content: Many sorrows come to the wicked, but loving kindness shall surround him who trusts in Yahweh.

시편 32:11.content: Be glad in Yahweh, and rejoice, you righteous! Shout for joy, all you who are upright in heart!
